title: taraxacum medioximum
intro: Taraxacum medioximum, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a plant species in the dandelion genus that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum medioximum include its ability to support liver function, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum medioximum can be made into teas, infusions, tinctures, and capsules, allowing for various forms of consumption for its medicinal benefits.
